questions.q: Announced by his publisher in late April 2026, what is the title of Haruki Murakami's new book, his first full-length novel to feature a sole female protagonist?
options: The City and Its Uncertain Walls

questions.q: Which "lost" Octavia E. Butler novel, which the author had previously blocked from reprinting, was announced in late April 2026 to be returning to shelves in a new edition after more than 40 years?
Announced in late April 2026, which of the following novels by Robert Jackson Bennett earned a spot as a finalist for the 2026 Hugo Award for Best Novel?
Releasing in late April 2026, 'Anxietyland' is a graphic memoir chronicling the lifelong experience with anxiety and depression of which popular cartoonist?
Highlighted in an April 2026 CrimeReads piece about cult literature, author Harrison Hill wrote a new book detailing Sarah Green's escape from which abusive American cult?
